facts.claim: Cairns is a city in the Cairns Region, Queensland, Australia, on the tropical northeast coast of Far North Queensland.

Cairns (/ˈkɛərnz/ ⓘ KAIRNZ; Yidiny: Gimuy) is a city in the Cairns Region, Queensland, Australia,[3] on the tropical northeast coast of Far North Queensland. In the 2021 census, Cairns had a population of 169,312.[2]
